arts.ttl: 'This is something we need' - Matthijs de Ligt explains why Amad is so important to Man United
arts.sum: Amad spared Manchester United's blushes against Southampton, scoring a dramatic hat-trick to help them seal a 3-1 win at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim spoke with Sir Jim Ratcliffe after Manchester United win
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe was back at Old Trafford for the first time in two months to see Man United win late on against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Marcus Rashford exit possibility revealed as European elite linked
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is reportedly subject to intensifying interest from European giants, with Manchester United keen to move the Englishman on this January.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer to join Jose Mourinho for first job since Man Utd sacking
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker and manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer is set to make his return to coaching with Turkish side Besiktas to join Jose Mourinho in the Super Lig

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's reaction to Man Utd 3 Southampton 1
arts.sum: We improved in the second half and, in the final 30 minutes, I felt Southampton were very tired, with the pressure we created. "What I said was to try to understand the game, why we were suffering, and then explain, in five minutes, the way we're supposed to do the second half.

arts.ttl: Every word from Ruben Amorim's press conference following Man Utd v Southampton
arts.sum: So, I look at the game, try to understand the game to improve my players and to help the team to be better." And I think you said generally your players are tired?

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Dortmund step up pursuit of Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are stepping up their pursuit of Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Rasmus Hojlund's furious blast towards Man Utd team-mate spotted against Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United came away as victors over Southampton, but after the first half, Alejandro Garnacho's early miss looked like it could be costly for the Red Devils at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Miss of the season? Antony has moment to forget against Saints
arts.sum: Antony missed a glorious close-range opportunity to draw Manchester United level against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo matches Cristiano Ronaldo feat with Man Utd hat-trick against Southampton
arts.sum: Amad Diallo scored the first hat-trick of his senior career as Man Utd defeated Southampton 3-1 on Thursday.
